_comment: exp_013 — same as exp_012 boxed_rescue but max_tokens 2048 → 4096 to attack the weak free-form rescue rate. Reused rescue_notebook.ipynb at repo root reads this config.
notes: Only knob changed from exp_012: rescue.max_tokens 2048 → 4096. Hypothesis: free-form rescue was weak (+0.66pp) because base Thinking-2507 couldn't fit thinking + boxed answer in 2048 tokens after seeing the GRPO trace. MCQ rescue (+4.80pp) is unaffected because the MCQ prompt forces 'output ONLY the letter' — model won't use the extra room. max_num_seqs reduced 32 → 24 to fit 2× KV per sequence.
